sprint_goal: Establish secure EKS infrastructure, Postgres Database, and IAM authentication layer
key_deliverables: EKS Cluster, RDS Instance, Cognito User Pool, Basic Auth API
demo_objectives: Show kubectl access to cluster; Demonstrate JWT token generation via Postman
success_criteria: Infrastructure deployed via Terraform; API authenticated against Cognito
risk_factors: AWS Quota limits; Complexity of EKS networking
mitigation_strategies: Early quota increase requests; Pair programming on Terraform modules

sprint_goal: Implement SOW ingestion pipeline, AI extraction worker, and PII sanitization
key_deliverables: SOW Upload API, SQS Event Bus, AI Worker Service, PII Redaction Logic
demo_objectives: Upload PDF and see extracted JSON data in logs
success_criteria: SOW upload triggers worker; Worker extracts valid JSON; PII is redacted
mitigation_strategies: Human-in-the-loop review UI preparation; AWS Comprehend fallback

sprint_goal: Enable Vector Search matching and secure Financial Transactions via Stripe
epic_coverage: AI SOW Processing & Matching, Financial Integration
key_deliverables: Vector Search API, Audit Service, Stripe Payment Intent API, Webhook Handler
demo_objectives: Match vendor to project; Complete test payment via Stripe
success_criteria: Vector search returns relevant vendors; Payment updates ledger idempotently
risk_factors: Stripe webhook failures; Vector search latency
mitigation_strategies: Implement webhook signature verification; Index tuning for pgvector
